description: Reviewer-dev engine lifecycle hooks. Evidence-first, prompt-only.

hooks.prompt:
DOMAIN: reviewer-dev
IF task involves: code review, PR review, security audit, OWASP analysis, quality gate enforcement, or vulnerability assessment
THEN: Read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/SKILL.md before responding. Classify into one primary surface: code-review, security-audit, beautiful-code, guardian-protocols, ai-augmented-review, security-compliance, or evidence-anchored-review.
RATIONALE: Reviews without evidence are opinions. Every finding must cite the specific code, the specific risk, and the specific fix.
IF_SKIP: Risk shallow review that misses logic bugs while nitpicking formatting.

VERIFY: If this session involved code review or security audit, was every finding anchored to specific evidence? Were prior ADRs or failure history consulted for high-stakes areas?
IF_NO: Continue and consult ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/references/evidence-anchored-review.md before completing.
